name: cumulusvpn
description: CumulusVPN — decentralized VPN on Flux Cloud (monorepo)

scripts.build:web: yarn workspace @cumulusvpn/core run build && yarn workspace @cumulusvpn/web run build
scripts.check: yarn format:check && yarn format:check:workspaces && yarn lint && yarn typecheck && yarn test
scripts.deploy:landing: node clients/landing/build.mjs --check && npx wrangler deploy --config clients/landing/wrangler.jsonc
